experiment: Task 17: agentic search rerun for new collective routines

grad_ar.hardware_eval: all candidates FAILED on Trainium HW benchmark due to autograd backward dispatch issue in the generic benchmark template (a pre-existing limitation of the search harness for problems whose outputs feed backward())
grad_ar.phase5_codegen: runtime/trainium_grad_ar_7node.py written with the simulator winner (flat_single_ar)
grad_ar.production_runtime: runtime/trainium_grad_ar.py retains the screening winner (async_back_to_back); training/train_olmoe10b.py imports from this primary path
grad_ar.notes: Mirror of the existing trainium_alltoallv.py vs trainium_alltoallv_7node.py split: the _7node file is the agent_s simulator pick; the primary file is the manually-curated hardware-validated implementation

dxe.failure: search/correctness_test.py:TrackedTensor lacks .exp() and several other ops needed by the distributed-softmax pattern; the simulator was designed for AllToAllV-style ops and does not model distributed-loss routines
dxe.production_runtime: runtime/trainium_dxe.py retains the screening winner (async_back_to_back) from Task 16
dxe.blocker: extending TrackedTensor to support .exp/.log/.gather/.where/.clamp would unblock the dxe search; estimated ~50 lines in search/correctness_test.py and several test-case adjustments
